experience.title: Stage Manager
responsibilities: Coordinated all aspects of production schedules and rehearsals
Managed communication between directors and actors to ensure clarity in performance expectations
Oversaw set design and logistics to maintain production quality and deadlines
Developed and implemented safety protocols for live performances
achievements: Successfully managed over 20 live productions with audiences of up to 500 people
Recognized for excellence in leadership at the Annual Theater Awards

response.summary: Dynamic and detail-oriented stage manager with extensive experience in coordinating theatrical productions. Proven ability to lead teams and manage complex schedules while fostering collaboration among diverse stakeholders. Seeking to transfer strong organizational and communication skills to a new field.
